$description: Component tokens for Mobile Tab container component that groups multiple tab items together. Supports fixed and intrinsic width behaviors, with optional border visibility. Figma Reference: Node ID 27-10855

$component.name: Tab
$component.description: A mobile container component that groups multiple tab items together for navigation. Supports horizontal layout with configurable spacing between items, optional border visibility, and different width behaviors (fixed or intrinsic).
$component.structure: Container with optional border, horizontal flex layout containing multiple tab items with configurable gap spacing

sizes.sm: 24px height - Small size for compact mobile interfaces
sizes.md: 32px height - Medium size for standard mobile navigation
sizes.lg: 40px height - Large size for prominent mobile tabs
sizes.xl: 40px height - Extra large size (same as large)

variants.default: Standard tab container with visible border
variants.no-border: Tab container with hidden border for cleaner appearance

usage.contexts: Mobile navigation bars, content switchers, filter tabs, section navigation, tabbed interfaces
usage.features: Border visibility toggle, Configurable gap spacing, Fixed or intrinsic width behavior, Overflow handling

border.$comment: Border tokens for mobile tab container - includes radius

radius.description: Mobile tab container default border radius - none - 0px

padding.$comment: Padding tokens for mobile tab container

gap.$comment: Gap tokens for spacing between mobile tab items
gap.description: Mobile tab container gap between items - 0px

height.$comment: Height tokens for mobile tab container across different sizes

default.description: Mobile tab container height for default variant - 56px

top-icon.description: Mobile tab container height for top-icon variant - 64px

variants.$comment: Color tokens for mobile tab container variants

background.description: Mobile tab container default background - transparent - #FFFFFF00

border.description: Mobile tab container default border color - transparent - #FFFFFF00

background.description: Mobile tab container no-border background - transparent - #FFFFFF00

border.description: Mobile tab container no-border border color - transparent - #FFFFFF00
